Textual Amendments


F57 Words in rule 2.6(1) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 5(a)(i) (with rule 45 )


F58 Rule 2.6(1)(d) omitted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 5(a)(ii) (with rule 45 )


F59 Words in rule 2.6(2) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 5(b) (with rule 45 )


F60 Words in rule 2.6(3) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 5(c) (with rule 45 )


Marginal Citations


M25 Section 10 was amended by section 139(1) of and paragraphs 54 and 56(a) (b) and (c) of Schedule 3 to the Adoption and Children Act 2002 and section 77 of the Civil Partnership Act 2004 and section 36 of the Children and Young Persons Act 2008 (c. 23) .


### [ F61 Single lay justice: power to refer to the family court E+W


2.7. Where a single lay justice—


the single lay justice must refer the matter to the family court. ]


Textual Amendments


F61 Rule 2.7 substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 6 (with rule 45 )


### Court's discretion as to where it deals with cases E+W


2.8. The court may deal with a case at any place that it considers appropriate.


### Computation of time E+W

metadata.title: Part 2 — Application and Interpretation of the Rules
